content.text:
Excellent! I now have a complete picture of where the logo is used. Let me compile the findings: ## Logo Usage Report - Next.js Compass AI Project I found all logo references in this Next.js project. Here's the complete breakdown: ### Logo Asset Location - **File**: `/Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/compass-ai/public/logo.png` ### Logo Rendering Locations #### 1. **CompassApp Component** - `/Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/compass-ai/app/CompassApp.tsx` This is the main component that renders the logo in multiple places: - **Line 293-294**: CSS styling for logo container ```css .logo-wrap { display:flex; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:2.5rem; } .logo-wrap img { height:88px; width:auto; object-fit:contain; } ``` - **Line 384-386**: Intro/Welcome screen logo (88px height) ```tsx
``` - **Line 408-410**: Questions/Assessment screen logo (58px height - with "screen-logo" class) ```tsx
``` - **Line 455-457**: Loading screen logo (88px height, default) ```tsx
``` - **Line 469**: Print header logo (60px height - with "print-logo" class) ```tsx ``` - **Line 479-481**: Results screen logo (64px height - with "screen-logo" class) ```tsx
``` - **Line 355, 357**: Print mode CSS for logo hiding/styling ```css .screen-logo { display:none !important; } /* Line 355 */ .print-logo { height:60px !important; width:auto; } /* Line 357 */ ``` #### 2. **Home Page** - `/Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/compass-ai/app/page.tsx` The home page imports and renders the `CompassApp` component (which contains all the logo usage). The page itself is a simple wrapper that doesn't directly reference the logo. #### 3. **Root Layout** - `/Users/ryanvasquez/Desktop/compass-ai/app/layout.tsx` The layout file does not contain any logo references; it's just a standard Next.js root layout. ### Summary The logo is exclusively used in the **CompassApp component** across 5 different screens/states: 1. **Intro screen** - 88px 2. **Questions screen** - 58px 3. **Loading screen** - 88px 4. **Results screen** - 64px 5. **Print header** - 60px All instances use the same source file (`/logo.png`) and are centered using a flex container with appropriate margins.
